stat_block.text: Peachwood weapons have an auburn tinge in direct sunlight. Peachwood is treated as duskwood for undead creatures' resistances or weaknesses related to duskwood (bypassing a jiang-shi's resistance, for example). In addition, peachwood weapons bypass a small portion of the resistances of any undead creature. Strikes with a peachwood weapon treat an undead's resistances against physical damage as 2 lower for standard-grade peachwood, and 4 lower for high-grade.

traits.name: Uncommon
traits.text: Something of uncommon rarity requires special training or comes from a particular culture or part of the world. Some character choices give access to uncommon options, and the GM can choose to allow access for anyone. Less is known about uncommon creatures than common creatures. They typically can't be summoned. The DC of Recall Knowledge checks related to these creature is increased by 2.

variants.craft_requirements: At least 250 gp of peachwood + 25 gp per Bulk
variants.name: Peachwood Weapon (Standard-Grade)

variants.craft_requirements: At least 9,500 gp of peachwood + 950 gp per Bulk
variants.name: Peachwood Weapon (High-Grade)
